description: Mirror SS4O envelope fields into the legacy paths the OpenSearch Dashboards explore plugin reads by default + strip noisy SS4O exporter defaults. OSD's logs use-case hard-codes DEFAULT_LOGS_COLUMNS_SETTING=['body','severityText','resource.attributes.service.name'] (src/plugins/explore/server/explore_ui_settings.ts), but the OTLP opensearchexporter in ss4o mode writes severity.{text,number} nested and resource attributes flat-dotted (literal key 'service.name' under resource, NOT nested resource.service.name) — those default columns render empty without this normalization. Only severity and resource.service.name are mirrored — copying all flat resource.<k> values into resource.attributes.* duplicated every record's resource block (cluster_name, node_name, zone_name, ingest_source, ...) for no operator benefit. The exporter also stamps a useless `attributes.data_stream: {dataset:default, namespace:namespace, type:record}` envelope on every doc even when logs_index sends to a static index — strip it. The resource service.name lookup checks both the flat-dotted shape (Envoy / CoreDNS / netlogger / CP zerolog — opensearchexporter ss4o output) and the nested shape (Claude Code OTLP, which emits resource.service as a sub-map). Tracking issues for the SS4O exporter/UI divergence: opensearch-project/data-prepper#5791, opensearch-project/opensearch-catalog#118, open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib#45428 — all open, no upstream fix. Idempotent (only writes when source field is present and dest is missing).

script.source: if (ctx.severity instanceof Map) { if (ctx.severity.text != null && ctx.severityText == null) { ctx.severityText = ctx.severity.text; } if (ctx.severity.number != null && ctx.severityNumber == null) { ctx.severityNumber = ctx.severity.number; } } String svcName = null; if (ctx.resource instanceof Map) { if (ctx.resource.containsKey('service.name') && ctx.resource.get('service.name') != null) { svcName = ctx.resource.get('service.name').toString(); } else if (ctx.resource.service instanceof Map && ctx.resource.service.name != null) { svcName = ctx.resource.service.name.toString(); } if (svcName != null) { if (ctx.resource.attributes == null) { ctx.resource.attributes = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.resource.attributes instanceof Map) { if (ctx.resource.attributes.service == null) { ctx.resource.attributes.service = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.resource.attributes.service instanceof Map && ctx.resource.attributes.service.name == null) { ctx.resource.attributes.service.name = svcName; } } } }
